══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Locathah — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Locathah — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Locathah — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 27 damage. Locathah — Winged Striker HP: 40/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 20 damage. Locathah — Winged Striker HP: 20/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Locathah — Winged Striker HP: 5/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Locathah — Winged Striker --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Locathah — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Locathah — Winged Striker HP: -7/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
